# Copilot Instructions for NestJS MCP Server

This workspace contains a NestJS application for an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.

## Project Overview
- **Framework**: NestJS with TypeScript
- **Type**: Backend application
- **Purpose**: MCP server implementation

## Development Setup
- Node.js and npm are required
- Dependencies are installed via npm
- Development server runs on port 3000 (default)

## Key Commands
- `npm install` - Install dependencies
- `npm run start` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run test` - Run tests
